sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; const Footer = () => { return (
{/* Logo & Assignment Badge Column */}
CareFlow HMS

A comprehensive cloud-based portal for hospital operations, appointment booking, and secure medical scan storage.

☁️ Cloud Computing Assignment
{/* Group Members Column */}

Group Members

  • Thamindu Jayawardana
  • Hashan Miyuru
  • Kavindya Sandipani
{/* Socials & Connect Column */}

Connect & Source

Review project code repository and team portfolios via references.

{/* GitHub Link */} {/* LinkedIn Link */}
{/* Footer Bottom copyright banner */}

© {new Date().getFullYear()} CareFlow HMS. All rights reserved.

Privacy Policy • Terms of Service
); }; export default Footer;
